title: Comforting Charred Italian Beef Braised Osso Buco
description: Tender beef short ribs in a rich, umami sauce with a hint of nutmeg, served in a paleo-friendly osso buco style with a fondue pot.
instructions: Season the beef short ribs with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in the fondue pot over medium-high heat.
Sear the beef short ribs until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Remove the beef short ribs from the pot and set aside.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the miso paste and red wine, and stir to combine.
Add the beef broth and bring to a simmer.
Return the beef short ribs to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and braise for 2 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the fresh parsley and ground nutmeg.
Serve the osso buco hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
